message: 22222222222222CamPart A powerful Camera-Part-Setter ___ Description CamPart is a free Roblox Studio Plugin developed by Seem. It allows you to move your camera on any BasePart. The plugin includes a Realtime-Viewer (ViewportFrame) for environment rendering within a custom radius. Documentation: coming soon | 5 min YouTube Guide: video Features ● CamPart Panel - Camera to Selected: Smooth focus. - Rotate (+/- 10): Horizontal Y-Axis rotation(camera). ● RealtimeView Panel 1. Select Part 2. Enable 3. Refresh - Radius: Set via positive number (visualized by sphere). - DragableEdge: Dynamic UI adjustment. - Sync: Align RealtimeView with Studio Viewport. ● Message Panel Stay updated on news and bugfixes. A small blinking bell 🔔(next to the -Message- Panel Title) will notify you of important assets or updates from Seem. Note: No spam, only relevant plugin information.
